topic.title: Installing The Product On Your System.
topic.shortdesc: This section describes how to install the product.

body.p: You can't install the product without meeting prerequisites. It won't work if requirements aren't met.
Login to the web console and check the datacenter settings. Make sure to setup the enviroment variables.
The installation process — which takes several minutes — requires network access.
The the installer will download all necessary components.

The installation process for this particular product requires that you first verify that all of the necessary prerequisites have been properly configured and that the system meets all of the minimum requirements that are specified in the official documentation before you attempt to begin the installation process itself.
The U.S.A. data center is located on the east coast.
Install the product. Then configure it.
In this section we describe the process.
The software was installed by the administrator.
Add the server to the blacklist configuration.
Wait for the process to complete...
The product allows you to manage containers efficiently.
Install the addon component for the meta-data service.
You should endeavor to utilize the application accordingly.
